stemHtml: The retina contains two kinds of light-sensitive receptors, namely rods and cones. Cones are..

options.a: more numerous further away from the centre of the visual field and are responsible for colour vision.
options.b: concentrated toward the centre of the field of vision and are responsible for colour vision.
options.c: concentrated toward the centre of the field of vision and are responsible for night vision.
options.d: more numerous further away from the centre of the visual field and are responsible for night vision.
